title: Animals Only Origins
description: make only animal origins that can be chosen
body:
**_You want to install all origins mod, and maybe you dont want anything weird and just want animals for the origins?_, 
well, this is the mod!!**


![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b69ef51a7901ff9bda07f08104130d9ee46472c.png)

**Animals Only Origins** is an (InDev but Discontinued) origins addon based on the template of 'Remove Base Origins' addon by JammingDino. This addon leaves only animals and non-sentient origins and makes the origin size not affected by pehkui so the player can choose any size and will enlarge or ensmall scaled to the choosen size

# Function
So it basically just remove all origins, and leave only animals (like fox, dog, cat) and non-sentient mob/creatures (like guardian, enderman, snow golem) that make sense (to me)

![The GUI provided by "Alternate Origin GUI" (by UltrusBot) show only animals origins (the duplicated origin icons is a result of installed OriginTweaks (by ChromexUnderscore) that not yet been made unchoosable in this mod addon)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/662e5ddd08998dc91870be82ee3d59a1aa3e4cfe.png)
> The GUI provided by "Alternate Origin GUI" (by UltrusBot) show only animals origins (the duplicated origin icons is a result of installed OriginTweaks (by ChromexUnderscore) that not yet been made unchoosable in this mod addon)

### Supported Origins Mod
**Fully Supported:**
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) (itself) by Apace
- [Origin++](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-plus-plus) by QuantumXenon
- [Animals Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/animal-origins) by Ellipog
- [Mob Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/moborigins) by UltrusBot

**Brokenly Supported:**
- [Origins: Statures](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkerers-statures) by sisby-folk
- Pehkui

**Not Compatible:**
- Remove Base Origin by JammingDino

## Issues
i will not do anything for the available issues, unless there's a proof for players' careness by submitting an issue (maybe this below) in the Issue Tracker.

**Known Issues**:
- Origins mods that use pehkui still affecting actual player size without respecting the chosen size (it should change player size scaled to the chosen base size, if "Origins: Statures" mod installed)

# Ideas
Some origin mod and mod addons had been making me unsettling by the choice of non-animal origins...
So i ended up made my own addon mod (since all mod that remove origins, also remove the animals origins), not from scratch (because i still learning how to make mods) 

the template code that i tweak is from a mod named "Remove Base Origin" (by JammingDino from Curseforge) that only remove origins from the original Origins mod (by Apace). Then i somehow learn the pattern of that mod and also apllied other Origins mod. 

### Uploading it here
It actually still in development and discontinued because the SMP i play in doesnt use Origins from the start, so i upload it here to archive and maybe some players find this useful (and maybe i can developing it more)

## Development Ideas
If there some people that interested in this project, i will plan some ideas that i will add into this mod, some of it are:
- Make the mod have its own ID
- Pehkui block reach based and scaled on the Statures and the Origin's abilities
- Adding OriginTweaks into the mod
